interactions.utterance: Which constructors have participated in races with a particular year and round?
interactions.intention: Find constructors participating in races with a specific year and round.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT C.CONSTRUCTORID FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORSTANDINGS C JOIN FORMULA_1_RACES R ON C.RACEID = R.RACEID WHERE R.YEAR = 2009 AND R.ROUND = 1

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the highest number of wins achieved by any constructor?
interactions.intention: Find the highest number of wins achieved by a constructor.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MAX(WINS) AS MAX_WINS FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORSTANDINGS

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you sort constructors by their total points in descending order?
interactions.intention: Sort constructors by their total points in descending order.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT CONSTRUCTORID, POINTS FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORSTANDINGS ORDER BY POINTS DESC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the lowest position achieved by any constructor?
interactions.intention: Find the lowest position achieved by a constructor.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MIN(POSITION) AS MIN_POSITION FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORSTANDINGS

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many constructors have scored more than 10 points?
interactions.intention: Count the number of constructors who scored more than 10 points.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CONSTRUCTORID) AS NUM_CONSTRUCTORS FROM FORMULA_1_CONSTRUCTORSTANDINGS WHERE POINTS > 10
